metadata.description: Detects the presence of a RedLine Stealer binary
metadata.author: me

signatures.description: The executable contains unknown PE section names indicative of a packer (could be a false positive)

T1045.long: Software packing is a method of compressing or encrypting an executable. Packing an executable changes the file signature in an attempt to avoid signature-based detection. Most decompression techniques decompress the executable code in memory.

signatures.name: pe_features

signatures.description: The binary likely contains encrypted or compressed data indicative of a packer

T1045.long: Software packing is a method of compressing or encrypting an executable. Packing an executable changes the file signature in an attempt to avoid signature-based detection. Most decompression techniques decompress the executable code in memory.

marks.description: A section with a high entropy has been found
Overall entropy of this PE file is high
